meaning: n.[生化]细胞松弛素,松胞素,细胞分裂抑素
examples: Enucleated cells are prepared by removing cell nuclei in the presence of the drug, cytochalasin b.
Effects of cytochalasin B and thawing program on glass micropipette (GMP) vitrification of mouse mature oocytes were investigated.
Cytochalasin D experiments confirm that the movement of statoliths is actin-dependent and the actin filaments exert basipetal forces on statoliths in gravity field.
